item.title: Pro AI Subscription Screen and Purchase Flow
item.intent: The subscription screen must be honest, clear, and never pushy — it sells Pro AI on its merits, not through dark patterns.
item.description: Per D-STORE-1, D-BIZ-5, D-BIZ-7, and Journey 6. Subscription screen shown when non-subscriber taps a Pro AI action. Shows: price ($3.99/mo or $29.99/yr), what is included, what happens on cancellation, that the app and local AI keep working without it. Annual plan prominently presented (saves ~37%). Uses StoreKit 2 for purchase flow. No separate account creation. Links to terms of service. No persistent upgrade banners, no nag screens, no feature-shaped holes.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscription screen clearly shows monthly and annual pricing with annual savings highlighted
Screen states what Pro AI includes and what happens on cancellation
Purchase completes via standard StoreKit 2 flow — no separate account creation
After subscribing, Pro AI actions work immediately without app restart
Non-subscriber never sees persistent upgrade banners or nag screens anywhere in the app
Subscription terms satisfy Apple App Store Review Guideline 3.1.2
